name: Mexican Chocolate Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, combine all ingredients.
2. Cook, stirring constantly for 10 minutes.
3. Serve over pound cake or ice cream.
4. To store, pour into a jar and cover.
5. The sauce keeps in the refrigerator up to 3 months.
6. To warm the sauce, set the jar in a pan of hot water over low heat.
